name: EuiContextMenuItem

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

toolTipContent.description: Required if using a tooltip. Add an optional tooltip on hover

toolTipProps.description:
Optional configuration to pass to the underlying [EuiToolTip](/#/display/tooltip).
Accepts any prop that EuiToolTip does, except for `content` and `children`.

layoutAlign.description: How to align icon with content of button

size.description: Reduce the size to `s` when in need of a more compressed menu

example: <EuiContextMenuItem layoutAlign="center" href={0} icon="link" toolTipContent={0}>Context menu item</EuiContextMenuItem>
